FOOTER.DESC: A dynamic, future-focused architecture and urban planning practice that believes in creating great places and spaces.

HOME.HERO_SUBTITLE: Designing resilient, people-focused cities through research, policy, and spatial design.
HOME.HERO_SUBLINE: Specializing in urban planning, GIS analysis, and large-scale institutional projects across Canada, the Middle East, and India.
HOME.ABOUT_DESC_1: I am an Urban Planner and Architectural Designer currently based in British Columbia and actively contributing to planning initiatives aligned with Canadian urban policies. With over 8+ years of combined experience shaping cities through research-driven design and strategic planning.
HOME.ABOUT_DESC_2: My work spans large-scale urban frameworks, healthcare infrastructure, institutional campuses, and resilient waterfront developments across Canada, the UAE, Oman, and India.
HOME.ABOUT_DESC_3: With expertise in GIS analysis, land use planning, and development applications, I focus on creating solutions that are both technically sound and socially impactful.
HOME.AFFILIATIONS_1: Pre-Candidate Member – Planning Institute of British Columbia
HOME.AFFILIATIONS_2: Pursuing professional certification pathway in urban planning in Canada

HOME.EXPERTISE_URBAN_LIST_3: Transit-oriented development (TOD) strategies and public realm connectivity

HOME.EXPERTISE_URBAN_LIST_5: Stakeholder coordination and alignment with municipal and regional policies

HOME.EXPERTISE_HEALTHCARE_LIST_1: Planning of multi-specialty hospitals, medical campuses, and healthcare facilities
HOME.EXPERTISE_HEALTHCARE_LIST_2: Functional zoning, patient flow optimization, and circulation planning
HOME.EXPERTISE_HEALTHCARE_LIST_3: Integration of clinical requirements with architectural design and services
HOME.EXPERTISE_HEALTHCARE_LIST_4: Focus on healing environments through natural light, materiality, and spatial clarity
HOME.EXPERTISE_HEALTHCARE_LIST_5: Coordination with medical planners, engineers, and regulatory standards

HOME.EXPERTISE_LANDUSE_LIST_4: Density optimization and growth management strategies
HOME.EXPERTISE_LANDUSE_LIST_5: Support for development applications and planning approvals
HOME.EXPERTISE_GIS_DESC: Utilizing advanced geospatial mapping algorithms to uncover insights for macro-planning.
HOME.EXPERTISE_COMMERCIAL_DESC: Innovative building design delivering modern aesthetics, functionality, and maximum ROI for developments.
